message:
chore: audit batch 403 — explain.rs, dual_run.rs, worker_channel.rs, stream.rs, federation.rs — all SOUND

Deep audit of 5 files (~5,233L total), 0 bugs found:
- explain.rs (1945L): NaN-safe PartialEq, morphism composition termination, allowlist intersection
- dual_run.rs (diff ~700L): obligation balance, promotion dedup
- worker_channel.rs (1200L): job state machine, sequence monotonicity, envelope validation
- stream.rs (811L): retention enforcement, consumer lifecycle
- federation.rs (1277L): config validation, bridge lifecycle, capability scope

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
